item.name: Grade 3 Skybuilders' Lauan Log
item.description: The aesthetically pleasing bark of this particular tree allows it to be used in its natural state to give a rustic feel to a home's interior. On the other hand, “rustic” is often used to mean “we can save time and effort by convincing gullible customers that having bits of rough-cut wood all over the place is somehow desirable.”
